title: Jack (still) Loves Sneezing
excerpt: It may seem a bit strange, but when he was just a few weeks old, Jack would smile after he sneezed. He also used to ball up his hands into little fists when he did it and it was really…
body: It may seem a bit strange, but when he was just a few weeks old, Jack would smile after he sneezed. He also used to ball up his hands into little fists when he did it and it was really the cutest thing. The other day while in Pittsburgh, I was taking a few photos of him on the hotel bed and caught these shots.
